pr.title: lb: name THP header fields and float constants in lbmthp
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: Readability/naming follow-up for lbmthp: THPDecComp header fields were renamed from unk_08..unk_28 to semantic THP header names, uses in lbmthp.c were updated, .sdata2 float/f64 constants were named in lbmthp.static.h, and fn_8001EBF0 received a small fuzzy-score improvement by folding ALIGN_32 into the assignment site. Review feedback cautioned against spending effort matching data sections before the whole TU text is matched.

key_files.role: Updated THPDecComp field uses, folded ALIGN_32 into a single assignment in fn_8001EBF0, and replaced some float literals with named constants.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbmthp.c hunks for fn_8001EB14, fn_8001EBF0, fn_8001ECF4, lbMthp_8001F410, lbMthp_8001F67C

key_files.role: Renamed THPDecComp fields at offsets 0x08..0x28 from unk placeholders to THP header names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPDecComp fields version, buf_size, x_size, y_size, frame_rate, num_frames, first_frame, frame_offsets, first_frame_size

key_files.role: Replaced unused placeholder static floats with named const .sdata2/f64 constants.

what_changed.text: THPDecComp offsets 0x08..0x28 were renamed from unk_08, unk_0C, unk_10, unk_14, unk_18, unk_1C, unk_20, unk_24, unk_28 to version, buf_size, x_size, y_size, frame_rate, num_frames, first_frame, frame_offsets, first_frame_size.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Summary bullet naming THP header fields

what_changed.text: Call sites and diagnostics in lbmthp.c were updated to use the renamed THPDecComp fields, including version checks, frame offset warnings, first frame offset/size handling, and OSReport debug output.
fn_8001EBF0 now assigns aligned_100 with ALIGN_32(data->unk_100) directly instead of assigning data->unk_100 first and applying ALIGN_32 in a later statement.
evidence_refs: pr_body: fuzzy match improvement from 98.77% to 99.23%

what_changed.text: lbmthp.static.h now declares lbl_804D7CC8 = 0.016666668f, lbl_804D7CD0 = 4503599627370496e0, and lbl_804D7CD8 = 0.0f, replacing placeholder declarations lb_804D7CC0 and lbl_804D7CE0.
No new 100% function match was claimed; the bot report recorded one unmatched item improvement for fn_8001EBF0 from 98.77% to 99.23%.

smart_moves.text: Updated the struct definition and all visible uses together, keeping semantic THP field names consistent across the header and implementation.
Kept the PR scoped as a readability/naming follow-up and explicitly stated that it produced no new 100% matches.
Recorded narrow score evidence for the one code-shape change in fn_8001EBF0 rather than presenting it as a completed match.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a binary/header format is understood enough to identify struct fields, replacing offset-style unk names with format field names improves readability and makes later call-site reasoning clearer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: field renames and use-site updates

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small expression-shape cleanup can improve a fuzzy match without producing a full match; preserve the distinction between fuzzy-score improvement and matched function closure.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ALIGN_32 folded into aligned_100 assignment
text_corpus: bot report shows fn_8001EBF0 98.77% to 99.23%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Data-section naming work can be mergeable but may be lower-value before the whole TU text is matched; reviewers may prefer spending effort on text-section completion first.
evidence_refs: review by ribbanya: waste of time to try to get the data section to match before code for entire TU is matched
author issue comment acknowledging workflow opened/committed this before catching it

naming_conventions.convention: For THPDecComp header fields, use THP/header-format names such as version, buf_size, x_size, y_size, frame_rate, num_frames, first_frame, frame_offsets, and first_frame_size instead of unk_08..unk_28.
Address-style names remained for data constants in this PR, e.g. lbl_804D7CC8, lbl_804D7CD0, and lbl_804D7CD8, while adding explicit const values.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Fold ALIGN_32 into the initial aligned_100 assignment to improve fn_8001EBF0 fuzzy match score.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.result: Fuzzy-score improvement only; no new 100% match claimed.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced named const float/f64 data declarations for constants used in lbMthp_8001F410 and GXInitTexObjLOD calls.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.result: Data naming/readability change; review cautioned against prioritizing data-section matching before TU text completion.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: It's a waste of time to try to get the data section to match before the code for the entire TU is matched. It's fine to merge, but I just wouldn't bother in general.

review_feedback.author: itsgrimetime
review_feedback.feedback: Acknowledged the data-section workflow issue and said the PR/commit was opened before they had a chance to catch it.

follow_up_queries: THPDecComp version buf_size x_size y_size frame_rate num_frames first_frame frame_offsets first_frame_size
lbmthp static const lbl_804D7CC8 lbl_804D7CD0 lbl_804D7CD8
review data section match before entire TU matched

evidence_refs: human_pr_text: PR body summary, verification claims, review quote and author reply
raw_diff: exact file hunks for all changed files
text_corpus: bot report, review, and issue comments
notes: Changed files and textual diffs are directly available and untruncated.
The fn_8001EBF0 score improvement is supported by both PR body and decomp-dev bot report.
Build verification and consumer cleanliness are author-reported in the PR body; no independent build log is included in the slice.
The semantic correctness of the THP field names is supported by PR body and diff usage, but this intake does not independently validate the THP file format.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep fuzzy-score improvements distinct from function matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2506 improved fn_8001EBF0 from 98.77% to 99.23% by folding ALIGN_32 into a single assignment, while explicitly stating that no new 100% matches were achieved.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Rename recovered format fields at the owning struct and update users together
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2506 renamed THPDecComp header fields in lbmthp.h and updated lbmthp.c use sites in the same change, replacing unk_08..unk_28 with names such as version, buf_size, x_size, y_size, frame_rate, num_frames, first_frame, frame_offsets, and first_frame_size.

source_update_candidates.title: Use PR #2506 as supporting evidence for text-before-data matching
source_update_candidates.text: A reviewer approved PR #2506 but cautioned that trying to match the data section before the whole TU code is matched is generally not worth the effort. This supports the existing text-before-data-matching standard rather than creating a new independent rule.
source_update_candidates.reason: Review feedback directly aligns with the loaded standard that text-section function progress should be prioritized over data-section parity for matching PRs.

source_update_candidates.title: lbmthp THPDecComp header fields at offsets 0x08..0x28
source_update_candidates.text: In src/melee/lb/lbmthp.h, THPDecComp offsets 0x08..0x28 were named version, buf_size, x_size, y_size, frame_rate, num_frames, first_frame, frame_offsets, and first_frame_size.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a concrete path-local struct field fact supported by the diff, suitable for curator review before source-corpus promotion.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that the named float constants are a general preferred style for ordinary literals; loaded standards warn against promoting literals into named storage without ownership evidence, and the review cautioned against data-section effort before TU text completion.
Do not record the author-reported build verification as independently reproduced by this intake.
Do not claim fn_8001EBF0 matched; the PR and bot report only support a fuzzy-score improvement.
